steps.assistant_text: Coloring-cap-tail vein: gl_func_0000871C sat at 99.96% (2 real word-diffs) as an as1 FP-setup scheduler tie — build emitted `lwc1 $f0,0x550(a0); mtc1 at,$f4` (load f550 then materialize the 4.0f constant) while the target schedules `mtc1 at,$f4; lwc1 $f0,0x550(a0)` (constant first). Flipped the schedule by inlining the f550 load into the comparison condition `if ((f550 = *(float*)((char*)a0+0x550)) < four)` instead of a separate pre-load statement, forcing `four` to materialize before the memory load. Result: 0 non-reloc word diffs; only reloc residue is the benign &D_00000000+0xE60 HI16/LO16 (same symbol, resolves to identical bytes). objdiff 100.0%.
